benefits.description: Lost 40 pounds total, but weight plateaued for past two months
Mild appetite suppression lasting 2-3 days between doses; reduced food cravings and 'food noise'

side_effects.description: Effectiveness diminishing despite dose increases; appetite suppression duration reducing from initial response

protocol_notes: User escalated from 12.5mg to 15mg every 5 days. By end of post, tried splitting dose to 8mg every 5 days. Concerned about rapid heart rate risk with Retatrutide addition due to existing heart rate medication. Currently consuming ~1500 cal/day, primarily one meal at dinner with sweet tooth/night snacking issue. User mentions researching Cagrilintide addition.
